message:
fix(fsfs): alphabetize re-exports and add schema conformance tests

- lib.rs: reorder pub use blocks to place file_classification after
  explanation_payload (alphabetical), fixing a clippy/rustfmt ordering
  inconsistency that broke module re-export grouping conventions
- schema_conformance.rs: add 52 lines of new schema round-trip tests
  validating serde fidelity for recently added contract types
  (determinism, high-cost artifact, file classification)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
